personal.preferred_title: Lead AWS Data Engineer | Python, SQL, Spark & Data Lake Platforms

summary: Lead/Senior Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise technology experience and recent hands-on focus on AWS data platforms, Python, SQL, PySpark/Spark, ETL pipelines, data quality, and analytics-ready data products. Built and operated large-scale telemetry and forecasting pipelines using Python/Pandas, PySpark, AWS S3, Glue, Redshift, and Oracle, with strong emphasis on reliability, monitoring, documentation, and business-facing reporting. Experienced partnering with analytics, operations, and engineering stakeholders to turn complex data into trusted datasets, dashboards, and decision-support workflows.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected automated Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting P95 telemetry from 6,000+ infrastructure endpoints, replacing manual processes with repeatable data workflows for capacity planning and executive reporting.

Built hybrid AWS/Oracle data platform patterns using S3 landing zones, AWS Glue ETL, Amazon Redshift workloads, and SQL-based reporting structures to support scalable analytics and forecasting use cases.
Designed historical data schemas, validation routines, and reconciliation checks to improve data integrity, auditability, and confidence in capacity and operational reporting outputs.

Developed PySpark and Python-based forecasting and transformation workflows that processed large telemetry datasets and supported bottleneck prediction, utilization analysis, and infrastructure optimization decisions.
Partnered with infrastructure, monitoring, analytics, and senior stakeholder teams to translate operational questions into clean datasets, dashboards, and actionable reporting products.
Maintained production-oriented documentation, operational runbooks, and monitoring practices around data pipelines, reporting workflows, and capacity analytics processes.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Gomez Synthetic Monitoring data for critical hospitality systems, using telemetry analysis to surface performance and user-experience improvement opportunities.
Led the FAST project, mining real-user and synthetic performance data to produce engineering recommendations adopted by application teams for customer-facing digital platforms.
Supported AWS migration planning and APM readiness assessments, connecting monitoring, analytics, and infrastructure concerns during modernization planning.
Created reporting and dashboard-oriented outputs from monitoring data to help technical and non-technical stakeholders understand service performance and risk.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Served as enterprise CA APM SME across 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents, providing reliable monitoring data and operational visibility for large-scale systems.
Designed dashboards, alert thresholds, SLA views, and reporting modules that became standards across client environments, improving consistency and trust in operational data.
Built Perl and Korn Shell extraction scripts to automate performance reporting and reduce manual weekly export effort.
Mentored technical teams, delivered documentation and training, and coordinated cross-functional upgrades with zero unplanned downtime.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster, improving scalability while preserving transaction correctness.
Built automated schema conversion and data validation pipelines to ensure data integrity throughout phased migration cutover.
Optimized SQL, Oracle access patterns, and C++/OCCI transaction processing to reduce hardware footprint while maintaining sub-second query latency.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Languages: Python, SQL, PySpark, PL/SQL, Perl, Korn Shell, XML, JSON, C++

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a serverless AWS data platform pattern using S3, Glue, Athena, Bedrock, and PySpark. Focused on scalable ETL, Parquet-based data lake storage, query optimization, and clean analytics-ready outputs.

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built a Python/PySpark forecasting engine for enterprise telemetry data, replacing manual forecasting with automated data pipelines, capacity modeling, and Streamlit reporting for infrastructure decision support.

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an agentic data-processing workflow using Python, vector embeddings, FAISS, LLM APIs, JSON contracts, and quality gates to score, deduplicate, tailor, render, and track job applications.
